events.name: equipment_failure
events.description: Nuclear reactor scram — emergency power only for 30 sols.

events.name: alien_signal
events.description: Anomalous radio signal detected from Phobos.

governance.rationale: Return to self-governance. No rulers, no masters.

meta_awareness.insight: Grove Ash wonders why the colony history feels like it follows a script.

memories.event: New hydroponics technique doubles crop yield per unit water.
Ice geyser breaks through permafrost near the colony perimeter.
Fine Martian regolith clogs air filters and reduces solar output.
Ice geyser breaks through permafrost near the colony perimeter.
Regolith dust causes chronic respiratory inflammation.
Coding breakthrough: automated drone maintenance saves labor.
Electronics damaged by electromagnetic pulse from solar event.
Video letters from family arrive after 22-minute delay.
